---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that Kronn doesn't help with today?
     A concrete user story works best ("As a … I want … so that …"). -->

## What you've tried

<!-- Existing features, workarounds, other tools — and why they fall short. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Your idea. Rough is fine. UI sketches, API shapes, or a CLI snippet
     all help if relevant. -->

## Alternatives

<!-- Other shapes you considered, or related features that exist in
     comparable tools. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Backend (Rust / Axum)
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Desktop bundle
- [ ] Workflows / Quick Prompts
- [ ] MCP / agents integration
- [ ] Docs / onboarding
- [ ] Other

## Anything else

<!-- Are you willing to send a PR for this? Hard deadline? Related issues? -->
